description: Accounts in Arabic script, probably from the same scribe/source as T-S AS 178.67 (PGPID 36896). Mentions items such as olive oil, honey, lemon, mastic, vetch. All the people named are "X al-Dawla," e.g., Mukhtār al-Dawla, Ḥiṣn al-Dawla al-Ḥakīm, Shujāʿ al-Dawla, Ṣaddām al-Dawla (or Ṣarrām? or an error for Ṣārim?).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
